allow: PowerShell(Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, CPU, @{n='RSS_GB';e={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1GB,2\)}}, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.WorkingSet64 -gt 100MB } | Select-Object Id, CPU, @{n='RSS_GB';e={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1GB,2\)}}, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize; "---GPU---"; if \(Get-Command nvidia-smi -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { nvidia-smi --query-gpu=memory.used,utilization.gpu --format=csv,noheader })

PowerShell($p = Get-Process -Id 10000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "PID=10000 alive CPU=$\([math]::Round\($p.CPU,0\)\)s RSS=$\([math]::Round\($p.WorkingSet64/1GB,2\)\)GB" } else { "PID=10000 NOT FOUND" }; if \(Get-Command nvidia-smi -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { nvidia-smi --query-gpu=memory.used,utilization.gpu --format=csv,noheader })

PowerShell($p = Get-Process -Id 10000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "PID=10000 alive CPU=$\([math]::Round\($p.CPU,0\)\)s RSS=$\([math]::Round\($p.WorkingSet64/1GB,2\)\)GB" } else { "PID=10000 NOT FOUND - completed or died" }; if \(Get-Command nvidia-smi -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { nvidia-smi --query-gpu=memory.used,utilization.gpu --format=csv,noheader })

PowerShell($p = Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.WorkingSet64 -gt 500MB }; if \($p\) { $p | ForEach-Object { "PID=$\($_.Id\) CPU=$\([math]::Round\($_.CPU,0\)\)s RSS=$\([math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1GB,2\)\)GB" } } else { "No heavy python process found" }; "---GPU---"; if \(Get-Command nvidia-smi -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { nvidia-smi --query-gpu=memory.used,utilization.gpu --format=csv,noheader })

PowerShell($p = Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.WorkingSet64 -gt 500MB }; if \($p\) { $p | ForEach-Object { "PID=$\($_.Id\) CPU=$\([math]::Round\($_.CPU,0\)\)s RSS=$\([math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1GB,2\)\)GB" } } else { "No heavy python process" }; "---GPU---"; if \(Get-Command nvidia-smi -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { nvidia-smi --query-gpu=memory.used,utilization.gpu --format=csv,noheader })

PowerShell($p = Get-Process -Id 7592 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "PID=7592 alive CPU=$\([math]::Round\($p.CPU,0\)\)s RSS=$\([math]::Round\($p.WorkingSet64/1GB,2\)\)GB" } else { "PID=7592 NOT FOUND" }; if \(Get-Command nvidia-smi -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { nvidia-smi --query-gpu=memory.used,utilization.gpu --format=csv,noheader })
PowerShell(Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, CPU, @{n='RSS_MB';e={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB,0\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)
